wins_analysis: No wins today as zero trades were generated. The system produced no recommendations, meaning the AI signal pipeline was unavailable and the zone score fallback also failed to identify qualifying setups.
losses_analysis: No losses today, but the real failure is zero participation in a strongly trending market (+1.0% Nifty with ADX 25). The fallback mechanism clearly has overly restrictive filters or was not triggered properly when AI was unavailable.
regime_impact: Today's trending_up regime with low VIX (12.8) was ideal for momentum/demand zone BUY setups. The system completely missed this opportunity — any long-biased strategy would have profited given broad market strength.

improvements.action: Debug and fix the zone score fallback system — ensure it generates at least 3-5 recommendations when AI is unavailable, especially when regime is trending_up and VIX < 15
improvements.reason: AI was unavailable today and the fallback produced zero setups despite ideal market conditions (ADX 25, Nifty +1%, VIX 12.8)

improvements.action: Lower the minimum zone score threshold from current level to 65 (or whatever produces at least 5 candidates) specifically when the fallback is active and regime is trending_up
improvements.reason: Zero setups on a +1% trending day means the threshold is too high for the fallback scoring method which likely scores lower than the AI probability model

improvements.action: Add a forced scan of top 10 Nifty 50 momentum leaders (highest RSI 14 > 60 with price above 20 EMA) when primary AI is offline and market regime is bullish
improvements.reason: On trending days, simple momentum filters would have caught multiple long opportunities that the broken fallback missed entirely

improvements.action: Implement an alert/log when zero recommendations are generated so the issue is flagged before market open, allowing manual intervention or parameter override
improvements.reason: Today's zero-trade outcome was avoidable if the operator had been notified early that the scan produced nothing despite favorable conditions

improvements.action: For tomorrow, pre-identify demand zones on RELIANCE, HDFCBANK, INFY, TCS, ICICIBANK that are within 1% of current price and queue them as BUY candidates with entry at zone + buffer
improvements.reason: These large-cap names likely participated in today's +1% rally and may offer pullback entries to demand zones tomorrow if the uptrend continues

tomorrow_focus: Ensure the scanning pipeline is fully operational before market open — if AI remains unavailable, manually verify fallback is generating candidates from Nifty 50 large-caps showing demand zone proximity in the ongoing uptrend.

symbol_notes.RELIANCE.NS: Likely rallied with broad market today — watch for pullback to nearest demand zone for BUY entry tomorrow
symbol_notes.HDFCBANK.NS: Banking names tend to lead in trending_up regimes with low VIX — prioritize if near a demand zone
symbol_notes.INFY.NS: IT sector participation in uptrend — check if demand zone aligns with 20 EMA support for entry
